description: Repack an unpacked XML directory into a new .docx: validates with auto-repair (when an original is given), condenses XML whitespace, then ZIPs the parts.
rules: writes a new packed.docx under record_store; never overwrites the source dir
ORIGINAL_DOCX enables validation diffing + author inference for redlining
condenses insignificant whitespace in every part except <w:t> text
usage: Set UNPACKED_DIR (an unpacked .docx dir). Optional ORIGINAL_DOCX for validation. Outputs: packed.docx and pack.log.
limitation: The vendored core imports defusedxml; if absent the porter records the import error and exits 0 with an empty audit log (degraded). With defusedxml present it validates, condenses, and writes the .docx.
